## How To Use This (Workflow)

### Every Morning (5 min)
1. Open README.md
2. Find today's date in WEEK_10_13_SCALE_AND_CASE_STUDIES.md
3. Know your 3-4 key tasks
4. Execute them

### Every Day at 3pm (10 min standup)
- "What I shipped/unblocked yesterday"
- "What I'm working on today"  
- "What's blocking me"
- "Win of the day"

### Every Friday at 4pm (30 min review)
1. Review WEEK_10_13_SCALE_AND_CASE_STUDIES.md weekly section
2. Check KPI dashboard (in README.md)
3. Celebrate wins
4. Plan next week

### Investor Meetings (as needed)
1. Start with SERIES_A_NARRATIVE.md (story)
2. Show FINANCIAL_MODEL.md (numbers)
3. Share 3_CASE_STUDIES.md (proof)
4. Answer questions from WEEK_10_13_SCALE_AND_CASE_STUDIES.md results
